channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The MacBook Neo is ‘the most repairable MacBook’ in years, according to iFixit
item.description: Apple’s new MacBook Neo isn’t just the most affordable MacBook — it’s also the company's most repairable laptop in “about fourteen years."

item.title: ByteDance has reportedly suspended the global rollout of its new AI video generator
item.description: A month after Seedance 2.0's launch in China sparked cease-and-desist letters from Disney and Paramount Skydance over its use of copyrighted materials, its developer ByteDance has reportedly hit pause on the release of the AI video tool in other regions. According to The Information, which spoke to two anonymous sources with knowledge of the matter, ByteDance has suspended Seedance 2.0's global rollout. Engadget has reached out to ByteDance for comment and will update this story if we hear back with more information. Seedance 2.0 caught heat from Hollywood studios almost immediately upon its r...

item.title: US Army announces contract with Anduril worth up to $20B
item.description: The Army described this as a single enterprise contract consolidating more than 120 separate "procurement actions."

item.title: ByteDance’s Controversial AI Video Model Reportedly on Hold Globally Due to Copyright Disputes
item.description: If you have your heart set on AI-generating some John Wick-style action scenes starring celebrities with weird voices, we have some bad news.
